title: Kofi's Colorful Peek-a-Boo
synopsis: Join little Kofi as he discovers colorful objects hiding behind his blanket in this interactive peek-a-boo adventure that teaches colors and encourages prediction skills through repetitive, soothing language.

pages.text: Kofi has a soft blanket. What's hiding underneath?

illustration.description: A smiling toddler boy named Kofi with dark skin and curly black hair sits on a fluffy cream-colored carpet. He holds a pale yellow blanket with gentle folds, about to lift it up. His eyes sparkle with curiosity and excitement. The background is a soft peachy-pink wall with simple white furniture.
illustration.alt: Kofi holding a yellow blanket, ready to peek underneath

illustration.description: Kofi's face lights up with joy as he pulls back the yellow blanket to reveal a bright red apple underneath. His mouth forms a perfect 'O' of surprise and delight. The apple is glossy and round, sitting on the cream carpet. Warm golden light creates a cozy atmosphere around them.
illustration.alt: Kofi discovering a red apple under his blanket

pages.text: Now the blanket covers something new. What could it be?

illustration.description: Kofi gently places his yellow blanket over a mysterious round object, creating a small bump. His expression is focused and gentle as he smooths the blanket down. A diverse family photo sits on a nearby shelf, showing people with various skin tones smiling together.
illustration.alt: Kofi covering a mysterious object with his blanket

illustration.description: Kofi claps his hands together in delight as he reveals a bright blue rubber ball. The ball has a slight bounce, captured mid-movement. Kofi's eyes are wide with wonder, and his smile stretches across his face. Soft shadows create depth while maintaining the gentle, soothing mood.
illustration.alt: Kofi happily discovering a blue ball

pages.text: The blanket hides another surprise. Peek-a-boo time again!

illustration.description: Kofi sits cross-legged, holding one corner of his blanket with anticipation. Underneath, there's a hint of something yellow peeking out. His grandmother, an elderly Black woman with silver hair in a bun, watches lovingly from a comfortable armchair in the soft-focused background.
illustration.alt: Kofi preparing for another peek-a-boo moment with grandmother nearby

illustration.description: Kofi giggles with pure joy as he uncovers a curved yellow banana. His hands are raised in excitement, and his whole body shows movement and happiness. The banana is perfectly ripe with a gentle curve. His grandmother smiles warmly in the background, her hands clasped together in delight.
illustration.alt: Kofi excitedly revealing a yellow banana while grandmother watches

pages.text: One more peek-a-boo! What GREEN thing is hiding?

illustration.description: Kofi leans forward with intense curiosity, his small hands gripping the edge of the blanket. There's a slight green glow emanating from underneath, creating anticipation. His expression shows concentration mixed with excitement. The room is bathed in warm afternoon sunlight streaming through a window.
illustration.alt: Kofi about to discover the final green surprise

pages.text: Peek-a-boo! A GREEN frog! Ribbit, ribbit!

illustration.description: Kofi bursts into delighted laughter as he reveals a friendly stuffed green frog toy. The frog has large, kind eyes and a gentle smile. Kofi's arms are outstretched in joy, his face beaming with happiness. All the colorful objects - red apple, blue ball, and yellow banana - are scattered around them on the soft carpet.
illustration.alt: Kofi laughing with joy at discovering a green frog, surrounded by all the colorful objects

metadata.illustrationStyle: Soft, rounded shapes with warm pastel colors. Gentle watercolor feel. Large, friendly faces. High contrast for baby eyes. Simple backgrounds.

questions.question: What color is Kofi's blanket?
questions.explanation: Kofi's blanket is pale yellow, which he uses to hide all the colorful surprises.

questions.question: What sound does the green frog make?
questions.explanation: The green frog makes a 'ribbit, ribbit' sound, which is the sound frogs make.

questions.question: Who is watching Kofi play?
questions.explanation: Kofi's grandmother watches him lovingly as he plays his peek-a-boo game.
